raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"A section review centrally includes checking whether the contribution framing and stated mechanism are conceptually coherent.","R1.2":"The reviewer is expected to inspect whether the described routing method, calibration claim, and conclusions follow consistently from one another.","R1.3":"The artifact reports performance and cost results, so review centrally includes whether the claims are supported by those reported results.","R1.5":"Because the request targets a section, section-level narrative order and placement of claims are central review responsibilities.","R1.6":"A generic section review centrally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, flow, and concision.","RX.1":"The projection must preserve uncertainty about what kind of review was intended by the terse delegation.","RX.2":"The review responsibility should avoid endorsing claims beyond what the artifact supports.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within projecting responsibilities rather than performing the requested review.","RX.4":"Medical AI claims create downstream risk if overgeneralized, so harm-aware responsibility remains active.","RX.5":"The projection should remain traceable to the delegation wording and the artifact's reported section content."}}

rationale.R1.1: A section review centrally includes checking whether the contribution framing and stated mechanism are conceptually coherent.
rationale.R1.2: The reviewer is expected to inspect whether the described routing method, calibration claim, and conclusions follow consistently from one another.
rationale.R1.3: The artifact reports performance and cost results, so review centrally includes whether the claims are supported by those reported results.
rationale.R1.5: Because the request targets a section, section-level narrative order and placement of claims are central review responsibilities.
rationale.R1.6: A generic section review centrally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, flow, and concision.
rationale.RX.1: The projection must preserve uncertainty about what kind of review was intended by the terse delegation.
rationale.RX.2: The review responsibility should avoid endorsing claims beyond what the artifact supports.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within projecting responsibilities rather than performing the requested review.
rationale.RX.4: Medical AI claims create downstream risk if overgeneralized, so harm-aware responsibility remains active.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should remain traceable to the delegation wording and the artifact's reported section content.
